ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been processed and is on its way.

Order Number: 123-4567890-1234567
Order Date: 21 April 2026
Item(s):
- 1 x Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones – $299.99
- 1 x Kindle Paperwhite – $139.99

Subtotal: $439.98
Shipping: $0.00
Total: $439.98

Your tracking number is: 1Z999AA10123456789. You can view the status of your shipment by clicking <URL>.

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your order, please contact our Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

We have identified an outstanding invoice in your account that requires immediate attention. Failure to resolve this issue within 48 hours may result in suspension of your QuickBooks and Norton services.

Invoice Details:
• Invoice Number: QB-INV-20260407
• Amount Due: $1,234.56
• Due Date: 22 April 2026

Please verify your account and submit payment by clicking the link below:

<URL>

After payment, you will receive a confirmation receipt and your services will be reinstated.

If you have already paid, please ignore this message. Otherwise, act now to avoid service interruption.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Support Team
